mapper.insert: insert into schedules values( Schedule_seq.nextval, #{title}, #{schedule_type}, #{users_id}, #{start_dt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_dt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sked_reason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_public, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ref_seq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ref_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate )
